meta.title: The fluoridation controversy
meta.sourceDoc: 88. P3 - The fluoridation controversy 氟化水争议.pdf
meta.matchedTitle: The fluoridation controversy 氟化水争议

passageNotes.label: Source
passageNotes.text: Explanations were extracted from the answer-analysis table in the source PDF by OCR. Minor OCR mistakes may remain; the official answer key is used for the answer field.

questionSections.text:
题目 27
答案：A
PDF 定位/解析：*..desired concentration of fluoride ... depending on theregionaltemperature and hence the amount of water people are likely to drink"一说明浓度部分取决于地区气温而非其他因素。

题目 28
答案：C
PDF 定位/解析："..fluoridation is thought to be an infringement on individual rights because it is compulsory medication of all members... 强制用药剥夺个人自由。

题目 29
答案：D
PDF 定位/解析：段落讲述 Kuhn 指出科学进步会受社会因素影响："...shift... can include social factors..." - 引库恩是为了说明科学可受非科学因素影响。

题目 30
答案：A
PDF 定位/解析："Sutton'sdetailedstudythrewdoubt...showedsignificantmethodologicalshortcomings"-Sutton发现早期研究方法存在缺陷。

题目 31
答案：B
PDF 定位/解析：末段："..this is notan issue onwhichdeclarationsbyscientific experts oughttobe considered thefinalword."作者认为科 学家不应最终决定政策。

questionSections.text:
题目 32
答案：NO
PDF 定位/解析：文中说传统划分事实/价值已被挑战，不能保持分离；陈述与作者观点相反。

题目 33
答案：YES
PDF 定位/解析："..ociologists have also downplayed ... by ignoring the number of eminent scientists who have questioned aspects of fluoridation."一与题干一致。

题目 34
答案：NOT GIVEN
PDF 定位/解析：文章未提到北美以外科学界是否忽视Sutton，因此信息缺失。

题目 35
答案：YES
PDF 定位/解析："Both arguments consider the scientific evidence... This difference is ... a legitimate difference in values."-说明双方 论证均有可取之处。

items.text:
题目 32
答案：NO
PDF 定位/解析：文中说传统划分事实/价值已被挑战，不能保持分离；陈述与作者观点相反。

题目 33
答案：YES
PDF 定位/解析："..ociologists have also downplayed ... by ignoring the number of eminent scientists who have questioned aspects of fluoridation."一与题干一致。

题目 34
答案：NOT GIVEN
PDF 定位/解析：文章未提到北美以外科学界是否忽视Sutton，因此信息缺失。

题目 35
答案：YES
PDF 定位/解析："Both arguments consider the scientific evidence... This difference is ... a legitimate difference in values."-说明双方 论证均有可取之处。

questionSections.text:
题目 36
答案：B
PDF 定位/解析："Thetraditionalviewisthatscienceisaspecial...objectivekindofknowledge.."传统观点：科学是客观、公正的。

题目 37
答案：G
PDF 定位/解析："Because social processes are involvedat all stages of the creation, evaluation,and establishing of scientificknowledge..."-社 会学视角认为科学知识受所有相关者信念影响。

题目 38
答案：A
PDF 定位/解析："Collins ... assertedthatthe outcome of experimentswas... reinterpretation in the light of other experiments."-结果最初 可能并未被完全理解。

题目 39
答案：D
PDF 定位/解析：支持者引语："...evidence for harm is limited and dubious... likely benefits outweigh dangers..." - 认为证据不足以采取保守策略。

题目 40
答案：C
PDF 定位/解析：反对者引语："...I oppose fluoridation ... and favor the voluntary use of fluoride tablets..." - 主张个人自愿选择是否摄入氟化物。
